item.title: Certificates
item.description: Year Title Links Jul 2022 Cloud-Delivered Security Services Cert Jun 2022 Threat Hunting Workshop 4.0 Cert May 2022 Turkish Airlines Technology Cyber Take-Off 2022 Cert Feb 2022 CyberOps Associate Cert • Badge Jan 2022 CCNA: Introduction to Networks Cert • Badge Nov 2021 NDG Linux Unhatched Cert Sep 2021 Etik Hacker Olma Cert • Badge Apr 2021 Introduction to Cybersecurity Cert • Badge Dec 2020 Etik Hacker Olmak: Web Sızma Testleri ve Bug Bounty Cert • Badge Jun 2020 Mobility Fundamentals Cert

item.title: Privacy
item.description: This site collects user behavior and usage data for analysis. These data are anonymous data, not personal and personal data.
